page.title: Follow-up Radar
page.subtitle: A safe, manual reminder workspace. New leads auto-create follow-ups; sent quotes auto-create nudge reminders. You decide what to act on next.
page.syncTitle: Backfill follow-ups for any leads that existed before this feature.

noMatch.title: No follow-ups match these filters.
noMatch.body: Try clearing one or two pills to widen the view.

footer.note: Follow-up Radar — manual reminder workspace. No messages are sent and no tickets are updated from this page.

row.markTitleBlocked: Resolve the guest issue first — outreach is blocked.
row.markTitleAddressed: Already marked addressed in this session.
row.markTitleDefault: Mark this follow-up as addressed (session only).

rowMenu.blockPlaceholder: Why is this blocked? (e.g. open complaint, refund pending)
rowMenu.dismissPlaceholder: Optional: why? (e.g. no longer relevant, guest cancelled)

disclaimer.title: Follow-up Radar v0 is a manual reminder workspace.
disclaimer.body: It does not send messages, update tickets, or automate guest communication. Use this view to decide what to do next — the action itself stays with you.
disclaimer.hinglish: Yeh radar batata hai kaunse follow-up aaj karne hain aur kaunse guest issue solve hone tak rokne chahiye.

blocked.title: Outreach blocked — resolve guest issue first.
blocked.hinglish: Pehle guest issue solve karein. Tab tak guest ko sales outreach mat bhejein.

empty.title: No follow-ups yet
empty.body: Follow-ups appear here automatically when you add a lead in your CRM, or when you send a quote. You can also add one manually.
empty.hinglish: Jab aap Leads mein nayi enquiry add karte hain, follow-up yahan apne aap aa jaata hai.

quickAdd.title: Add follow-up
quickAdd.subtitle: Manual entry — for items the system didn't auto-create.
quickAdd.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Call Mr Sharma about the wedding enquiry
quickAdd.contextPlaceholder: A line or two about what to do.
